Approval matrix summary

Short approval matrix card.

Rollback approval matrix

Rollback approval matrices matter when operators need a clear map of who can approve the removal of temporary priority paths across different incident severities.

The matrix should define approval owners, evidence requirements, and queue health checks that must be satisfied before rollback authority is granted.

It should also explain how matrix exceptions interact with fairness controls, fallback queues, and post-incident review expectations.
